3225780.name: Destroyed Base
3225780.description:
Destroyed Base: You are a vagabond who went into a dark, dangerous forest. Your main task is to survive, find resources to strengthen your shelter and defeat the enemies inhabiting these gloomy corners of the forest. Various bandits have escaped into this forest, who, like you, are hunting for various resources.

In this 2D pixel game you: Dangers will lie in wait for you at every step: marauders, insidious bandits and sinister killers. Wood and ore are all they need from this forest.

Explore the forest: Reveal its secrets, find resources and get out of there alive!

Game features:
- Pixel graphics
- Various levels and enemies
- Good soundtrack
